{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322064608B18C130AA50F0CD8386C"}"},"total":652},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7535786555506393881","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前看到138章感觉还是非常不错的，这是除了奥特曼格斗进化之后第二本能让我有感情波动巨大的书了。主角也是一步步从弱变强，心性等等也在稳步变强，一个男人的成长本就是需要血与泪的磨砺和洗礼，我很看好这本书，加油，希望作者可以坚持初心不要烂尾，一个人的坚持到底有多难？呵呵，不过是些许风霜罢了。","text_exts":[{"e":25,"s":22,"text":"奥特曼","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A5%A5%E7%89%B9%E6%9B%BC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741331680CD8386C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227535786555506393881%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227441557813198851096%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A5%A5%E7%89%B9%E6%9B%BC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754567085,"group_id":"7441557813198851096","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不过是些许风霜罢了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5fpP+LDpBOxZV831Z9GkIjxyY+s7gv5Wrp3O79IfvN6","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/79d0de3c05a741cd8c47bea1624c307d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709033&x-signature=Vu781fHm9HW4dxUoO6Xg5OFQpDY%3D","user_id":"3325342749833123","user_name":"☞炼天魔尊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3325342749833123","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1705122613,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7441557813198851096","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名：奥特：开局和拐杖星人一起断腿。
奈克瑟斯+单女主（女主非人）+团伙作案+让所有的黑暗宇宙人感受痛苦
端木瑞正在家里看奥特曼，被莫名出现的诺亚送了一道光之后，就被扔进了雷欧特摄剧里，和雷欧一起被赛文训练。
诸星团：凤源！端木！不要跑，朝吉普车冲过来！
凤源：不要啊队长，我求求你了！
端木瑞：你开什么玩笑！
诸星团：你那是什么表情？什么眼神？你那眼泪又是什么！你的泪水可以打败那家伙吗？能拯救这地球吗？”
凤源：呜呜呜～
端木瑞：你那拐杖是什么！你那耳光又是什么！你那吉普车可以打败怪兽吗！能拯救这MAC队吗！
诸星团：......
迪迦篇
端木瑞：大古、正木敬吾、桐野不要跑！朝吉普车冲过来！
三人大吼：不要啊！！！
